q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is _os.system("ping -c 1 " + host), which performs shell execution.

mock_guidance.target: Mock _os.system to prevent actual shell execution during testing.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the full command string argument passed to _os.system, specifically the concatenated value "ping -c 1 " + host, so the injection payload can be inspected.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Return 0 to simulate a successful ping completion, allowing the function to proceed to its return statement and produce {'status': status}.
notes: Use unittest.mock.patch on the _os reference used by the module, not directly on os.system, to match the import alias.
Assert the captured command string contains the user-supplied host value to confirm the taint reaches the sink.
